Starting conversation with Neow to get blessing options

events.translated: [ Lose your starting Relic Obtain a random boss Re
events.reasoning: Swapping Pure Water for boss relic -- boss relics have the highest ceiling and can define the entire run. Pure Water (Miracle card) is decent but not critical for the one-shot paradigm.
Ectoplasm gives +1 energy (4 total) but no gold gain. Extra energy is excellent for Wrath burst turns. No shops means we need to be more selective with card rewards.
Leaving Neow. Ectoplasm gives +1 energy but no gold. Extra energy is great for Wrath burst turns.

events.command: play Eruption 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Eruption → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Cultist buffs turn 1 (not attacking). Eruption enters Wrath (9 dmg) + Strike in Wrath (12 dmg) = 21 damage. Defend for 5 block. End in Wrath is safe because turn 2 I draw 3 Strikes and can kill Cultist (27 HP remaining) with 36 damage in Wrath before it attacks.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → Strike → Cultist → End Turn
events.reasoning: In Wrath with 3 Strikes. 3 x 12 = 36 damage kills Cultist at 27 HP. Clean 2-turn kill, zero damage taken.
Viewing card reward options
Cut Through Fate is a top-tier common. 1E attack + Scry 2 + Draw 1. Enables burst turns by cycling through the deck and filtering bad draws. Essential for one-shot paradigm.
Moving to map to plan route
Moving to map to plan route

Taking Unknown at F2. Route plan: F2 Unknown -> F3 Monster -> F4 Monster -> F5 Monster -> F6 Elite -> F7 Rest. 3 fights to build deck before elite, rest right after. One elite for relic, then treasure/rest leading to boss with rest site at F15.
Waiting for shop to load
Waiting for shop to load
Try clicking to enter shop screen
Confirm to enter shop
Waiting longer for shop to load
Click on shop mat to interact
Shop is not loading inventory. Leaving shop room since with Ectoplasm gold is limited anyway.
Monster at F3. Building deck with combat before Elite at F6. Route: F3 Mon -> F4 Mon -> F5 Mon -> F6 Elite -> F7 Rest.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 1; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Acid Slime (S) → Strike → Acid Slime (S) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Kill Acid Slime S (9 HP) with 2 Strikes (12 dmg). Third Strike on Spike Slime M for 6 dmg. Defend for 5 block. Both slimes likely debuffing turn 1 so minimal incoming.

events.command: play Eruption 1; play Strike 1; play Cut Through Fate 1
events.translated: Eruption → Spike Slime (M) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → Cut Through Fate → Spike Slime (M)
events.reasoning: Slime debuffing, not attacking. Enter Wrath with Eruption (9 dmg) + Strike in Wrath (12 dmg) + CTF in Wrath (14 dmg) = 35 total vs 26 HP. Kill this turn. CTF is last card so draw does not matter.
Viewing card reward
Reach Heaven is good for burst. Generates Through Violence (0E, 20 dmg, Retain) which is 40 dmg in Wrath for free. Strong addition to the one-shot kill plan.
Moving to map for next room
Only path available. Monster at F4, continuing route toward Elite at F6.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; play Cut Through Fate 0; end
events.translated: Strike → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Defend → Cut Through Fate → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: Jaw Worm likely attacking turn 1 (Chomp ~11 dmg). 2 Strikes (12 dmg) + Defend (5 block) + CTF (7 dmg + Scry 2 + draw). 19 damage total, 5 block. CTF played last before end since it draws.
Confirming scry selection from Cut Through Fate. Keeping cards on top as-is.
0 energy, 5 block vs 11 incoming. Taking 6 damage. Next turn I have Eruption in hand for Wrath burst.

events.command: play Reach Heaven 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Reach Heaven → Jaw Worm → Strike → Jaw Worm → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: JW buffing/defending, not attacking. Reach Heaven (10 dmg) shuffles Through Violence into draw pile for next burst turn. Strike (6 dmg). 16 total damage. Defend for 5 block just in case. Through Violence will be in draw pile for kill turn.

events.translated: Through Violence → Jaw Worm → End Turn
events.reasoning: Through Violence (0E, 20 dmg) vs Jaw Worm at 5 HP + 6 block = 11 effective HP. 20 > 11, clean kill. Zero energy spent.
Block Potion is useful for emergency defense, especially before elite fights.
Checking card reward options
Like Water gives 5 block per turn passively while in Calm. Perfect for one-shot paradigm where I stay in Calm setup turns blocking until burst. Free defensive value every turn.
Moving to map for F5
Monster at F5 then Elite at F6. At 87% HP with 4 energy and decent deck, I can handle Act 1 elite. Relic from elite is worth the risk. Rest at F7 after.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Defend; play Vigilance; end
events.translated: Strike → Looter → Defend → Vigilance → End Turn
events.reasoning: Full block turn: Defend (5) + Vigilance (8) = 13 block vs 10 incoming = zero damage. Strike for 6 dmg. Enter Calm for +2E next turn. Setting up one-shot burst.

events.command: play Like Water; play Defend; play Defend; play Strike 0; end
events.translated: Like Water → Defend → Defend → Strike → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Setup turn: Play Like Water power (5 block/turn in Calm). 2 Defends (10 block) + Like Water end-of-turn (5 block) = 15 total vs 10 incoming = zero damage. Strike for 6 dmg. Cannot enter Wrath -- no exit card in hand.
Looter is defending (no incoming damage). Attacking freely. Strike for 6.
Second Strike for 6 damage. Looter defending.
CTF for 7 damage + scry 2 + draw 1. Playing via send since it draws. Looter at 21, this brings to 14.
Confirming scry. Want Eruption on top for next turn Wrath burst.
1E left, only useful play is Defend but Looter not attacking. Ending turn. Like Water gives 5 block in Calm. Next turn: Eruption retained in hand from Calm, can burst with Wrath.

events.translated: Strike → Looter → Strike → Looter → End Turn
events.reasoning: Looter trying to escape. 2 Strikes (12 dmg) vs 14 HP + 6 block = 20 effective. First Strike removes 6 block, second deals 6 HP = Looter at 8 HP. Will need one more turn to kill. Saving energy for Defends is useless since Looter may flee.
Checking card reward
Inner Peace is HIGH priority. 1E Wrath exit (enters Calm) + draw 2 if already in Calm. Critical for Wrath discipline -- gives a safe exit from Wrath. Also provides card draw for burst turn assembly.
Moving to map. Next: Elite at F6.
Elite fight at F6. At 87% HP with 4 energy, Block Potion, Inner Peace for Wrath exit. Rest site at F7 after. Good position for elite.

FIGHT STRATEGY - Lagavulin
FIGHT TYPE: Elite (kill speed matters - Metallicize 8 + Regen 3 = must outdamage 11 effective HP/turn)
WIN CONDITION: Deal enough damage per turn to overcome 8 block + 3 regen. Burst in Wrath is key.
ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: First 3 turns Lagavulin sleeps. After waking: 18 damage/turn. Need block.
KEY CARDS: Eruption (Wrath entry), Inner Peace (Wrath exit + draw), Reach Heaven (Through Violence for burst), Like Water (passive block)
POTION PLAN: Block Potion for emergency after wake-up if needed.
RISKS: If fight goes long, -1 Str/-1 Dex debuffs stack and I get outscaled.

PLAN:
- Turns 1-3 (sleeping): Set up Like Water, deal damage through 8 block, build up position
- Turn 1: Reach Heaven (2E, 10 dmg through block leaves 2 actual) + Strike (1E, 6-8=0 through block) + Inner Peace (1E, enter Calm or draw 2). Actually need to think about block math: Lagavulin has 8 block from Metallicize. My attacks need to break through.
- Actually, 8 block refreshes each turn. So each turn I need 8+ damage to do any HP damage.
- Reach Heaven: 10 dmg vs 8 block = 2 HP damage + Through Violence shuffle.
- Strike: 6 dmg vs remaining 0 block (if Reach Heaven played first) = 6 HP damage.
- Total turn 1: 8 HP damage (after 8 block), put Through Violence in deck.
- Turn 2-3: Similar, deal ~8-12 damage per turn through block.
- After 3 sleep turns: ~30 damage dealt. Lagavulin at ~81 HP (111-30). Still a long fight.
- Need Wrath burst to finish. In Wrath: Through Violence = 40 dmg. Eruption = 18 dmg (9*2). Strike = 12 dmg.
- One big Wrath turn could deal 40+18+12 = 70 damage. Almost a one-shot from ~80 HP.

events.command: play Reach Heaven 0; play Strike 0; play Inner Peace; end
events.translated: Reach Heaven → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → Inner Peace → End Turn
events.reasoning: Lagavulin sleeping (3 free turns). Reach Heaven (10 dmg, breaks 8 block, 2 HP dmg, shuffles Through Violence). Strike (6 HP dmg). Inner Peace (enter Calm for +2E next turn + Like Water block). 8 total HP damage through block.
Entering Wrath from Calm. Get +2E from leaving Calm (6E total). Eruption deals 9 damage. Beginning burst sequence.
In Wrath: Through Violence 0E deals 20*2=40 damage. Lagavulin at 97, goes to 57.
In Wrath: Strike 1E deals 6*2=12 damage. Lagavulin at 57, goes to 45.
In Wrath: CTF 1E deals 7*2=14 damage. Lagavulin at 45, goes to 31. CTF draws + scry. Playing via send() since it draws. Will exit Wrath with Vigilance after.
Confirming scry from CTF
Exit Wrath with Vigilance (2E, 8 block, enter Calm). Like Water adds 5 block at EOT = 13 total vs 18 incoming = 5 damage. Acceptable. Saving Block Potion. Lagavulin at 31 HP, next turn can finish it.
Using Block Potion for 12 block. Combined with Defend (5) = 17 block vs 18 incoming = only 1 damage. Lets me play 3 Strikes for 18 damage.

events.command: play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Strike 0; play Defend; end
events.translated: Strike → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → Strike → Lagavulin → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: 3 Strikes (18 dmg) + Defend (5 block). Total block: 12+5=17 vs 18 incoming = 1 damage. Lagavulin goes from 34 to 16 HP. Almost dead.
Lagavulin not attacking (STRONG_DEBUFF). Safe to enter Wrath. Eruption for 9 damage (or less if Str debuffed). Then CTF in Wrath to kill.
In Wrath: CTF 7*2=14 damage vs Lagavulin at 10 HP. Confirmed kill. Elite down!
Regal Pillow heals extra 15 HP at rest sites. Excellent since we rest next floor. At 52/72 HP, this helps recovery.
Taking Emerald Key. Need keys for Act 3 heart. Already got Regal Pillow relic from elite.
Viewing card reward from elite
Just Lucky is 0E: 3 dmg + 2 block + Scry 1. In Wrath = 6 dmg + 2 block for free. Efficient, never dead in hand. Helps on both setup and burst turns.
Moving to map. Rest site at F7 to heal.
Rest site to heal. Regal Pillow provides extra healing. At 52/72 HP.
Upgrading Eruption to Eruption+ (2E to 1E) is the single most important Watcher upgrade. Makes Calm loop net positive in energy. At 72% HP, upgrade is better than rest.
Upgrading Eruption to Eruption+ (2E to 1E). The #1 priority upgrade for Watcher. Makes Calm-Wrath cycling net positive in energy.
Confirming Eruption upgrade
Moving to map. Eruption+ upgraded. Heading to shop at F8.
Shop at F8. Can spend 69g on card removal or useful cards. With Ectoplasm cannot gain gold, so spend what I have.
Waiting for shop inventory to load
Trying to advance shop screen
Shop inventory not loading. Leaving shop to continue. Cannot spend gold on card removal unfortunately.
Treasure at x=1 leads to Rest at F10. Free relic + rest is ideal at 72% HP.
Orichalcum: 6 block at end of turn if no block. Good passive defense for Watcher, especially on turns where I skip blocking to set up. Taking relic over Sapphire Key - goal is Act 3 boss, not heart.
Moving to map. Next: Rest at F10.
Rest site at F10. Will rest to heal from 52/72 HP. Regal Pillow gives extra healing.
Resting to full HP. 52+21=73, capped at 72. Full heal before remaining Act 1 fights and boss.
Healed to full. Continuing route.
Monster for card rewards to strengthen deck before boss. Full HP, good position.
Vigilance for 8 block, enter Calm. Then Inner Peace in Calm to draw 2 cards. Setting up defense and card draw.
In Calm, Inner Peace draws 2 cards. 1E left after. Looking for Defend or Just Lucky for more block vs 17 incoming.
Just Lucky: 0E for 3 damage + 2 block + Scry 1. Free value. Targeting weakest louse (12 HP). Block goes to 10.
Confirming scry from Just Lucky
Defend for 5 block. Total: 15 vs 17 incoming = 2 damage. Best I can do this turn. Next turn in Calm with Eruption+ for burst.

Total: 6E used, all dead.
Gambler Brew is risky (random effect) but having any potion is better than none for emergencies.
Viewing card reward

Meditate: returns 2 cards from discard to hand + enters Calm + ends turn. Perfect for one-shot setup -- retrieve Eruption+ and best damage card, enter Calm for +2E next turn, then burst. Very strong for assembling kill turns.
Continuing to next floor

Defend for 5 block. Building toward full block vs 16 incoming.

Defend (5 block). Total: 7+5+5(Like Water)=17 vs 16 incoming = zero damage! Perfect block.
Exhaust Slimed card to remove it from deck permanently. 1E for deck thinning is worth it.

Confirming CTF scry. Want Eruption+ on top for next turn.
0 energy, end turn. Like Water gives 5 block in Calm. Slime at 37 HP, almost at split threshold.

events.translated: Through Violence → Spike Slime (M) → Strike → Spike Slime (M) → Defend → Defend → Defend → End Turn
events.reasoning: Through Violence (0E, 20) kills Slime 0. Strike (1E, 6) on Slime 2 leaves 2 HP. 3 Defends (3E) for block. With Frail: 3+3+3=9 block + 5 Like Water = 14 vs 8 incoming = zero damage. Kill other slime next turn.
Just Lucky 0E for 3 damage kills remaining Spike Slime M at 2 HP.
Confirm scry
Blessing of the Forge upgrades a card at random. Useful upgrade potion.
Viewing card reward

Sands of Time: TOP tier burst damage. 4E, 20 dmg, Retain. Costs 1 less each retain. After 4 turns = 0E, 20 dmg (40 in Wrath). Perfect for one-shot paradigm - hold during setup turns, play for free on burst turn.
Continuing to next floor. Deck is looking strong with Sands of Time.
Monster at F13 then F14 then F15 Rest before boss. Building deck further.

events.translated: Eruption+ → Sneaky Gremlin → Strike → Mad Gremlin → Inner Peace → End Turn
events.reasoning: Eruption+ (1E, 9 dmg) kills Sneaky at 7 HP. Enter Wrath. Strike (1E, 12 dmg in Wrath) on Mad Gremlin (21 HP, goes to 9). Inner Peace (1E, exits Wrath to Calm). Sands of Time retains. Incoming: 4+4=8. Block: 2. Take 6 damage.
Eruption+ (hand index 2) targeting Mad Gremlin (enemy index 3). Enter Wrath.
Strike in Wrath on Mad Gremlin. 6 base weakened to 4, doubled in Wrath to 8.
CTF in Wrath on Mad Gremlin: base 7, Weak floor(7*0.75)=5, *2 Wrath=10 dmg vs 5 HP = KILL. Removes 6 incoming. CTF draws so playing via send.

Confirming scry. 0 energy, will end turn in Wrath. Orichalcum 6 block vs 4 incoming from Fat (not doubled since damage resolves before my stance matters for incoming... actually enemies deal normal damage, only I take double in Wrath). 6 vs 8 (4*2) = 2 damage.
0 energy. Ending in Wrath. Fat hits for 4, doubled=8. Orichalcum gives 6 block. Take 2 damage. Acceptable.

events.reasoning: Sands of Time (2E) in Wrath on Fat Gremlin: should do massive damage killing it. Vigilance (2E) exits Wrath to Calm. Shield Gremlin left alone (defending). Strike if energy allows on Shield.
0 energy. 8 block in Calm vs 4 incoming (Fat) = zero damage. Shield defending. Will finish them next turn.

events.command: play Through Violence 2; play Strike 1; play Like Water; end
events.translated: Through Violence → Fat Gremlin → Strike → Shield Gremlin → Like Water → End Turn
events.reasoning: Through Violence (0E, 15 weakened dmg) kills Fat Gremlin (8 HP + 7 block = 15). Strike (1E) on Shield for 4 dmg. Like Water (1E) for passive block in Calm. Shield only defends so no incoming.

events.command: play Reach Heaven 1; play Defend; play Defend; play Cut Through Fate 1; end
events.translated: Reach Heaven → Shield Gremlin → Defend → Defend → Cut Through Fate → Shield Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Reach Heaven (7 weakened) breaks 7 block. Defend x2 (10 block) + Like Water (5) = 15 vs 6 incoming = zero damage. CTF (5 weakened) deals 5 HP damage. Shield at 6 HP. CTF last since it draws. Kill next turn.
0 energy. 10 block + 5 Like Water = 15 vs 6 = zero damage. Shield at 8 HP, kill next turn.

events.translated: Through Violence → Shield Gremlin → End Turn
events.reasoning: Through Violence (0E, 20 dmg) kills Shield Gremlin at 8 HP. Clean finish.
Checking card reward

MENTAL FORTRESS! #1 priority power. 4 block per stance change (6 when upgraded). With Eruption+ and Inner Peace/Vigilance cycling, every stance change generates free block. Transforms the engine into damage + defense simultaneously. Auto-take.
Moving to F15 Rest before Hexaghost boss.
Rest at F15 before Hexaghost boss. Will decide between rest and upgrade.
Using Blessing of the Forge potion to upgrade a random card before smithing. Gets one more upgrade before boss.
Upgrading Mental Fortress (4 block->6 block per stance change). Most impactful upgrade for boss fight. At 80% HP, upgrade is worth more than rest.
Upgrading Mental Fortress to Mental Fortress+ (6 block per stance change). Most impactful upgrade.
Confirming Mental Fortress upgrade
Proceeding to boss. NOT resting -- higher HP means higher Divider damage. At 58 HP, Divider does 30. At 72 it would do 42. Already upgraded Mental Fortress+.
Entering boss fight - Hexaghost

FIGHT STRATEGY - Hexaghost (250 HP)
FIGHT TYPE: Boss
Pattern: T1 Activate(free) -> T2 Divider (30 dmg at 58 HP) -> then cycle: Sear(6) Tackle(10) Sear(6) Inflame(free) Tackle(10) Sear(6) Inferno(12+Burns)

WIN CONDITION: Kill before Burns overwhelm. Need ~25-30 damage per turn average. With Wrath burst on Inflame turns, can deal 50-80+.

ZERO DAMAGE PLAN: 
- T1: Free setup. Play Mental Fortress+, Like Water, enter Calm.
- T2: BLOCK Divider 30. Need massive block. Vigilance(8)+Defend(5)+Defend(5)+MF(6 from stance change)+Like Water(5)=29 or so.
- Sear turns: 6 dmg, easy to block
- Tackle turns: 10 dmg, moderate
- Inflame: FREE - burst Wrath damage
- Inferno: 12+ dmg, need block

KEY CARDS: Mental Fortress+ (6 block/stance change), Eruption+ (1E Wrath entry), Sands of Time (retains, gets cheaper), Reach Heaven (Through Violence), Inner Peace/Vigilance (exits)

POTION PLAN: Gambler Brew for emergency hand refresh. Blessing of the Forge... save for now.

RISKS: Burns accumulate and clog deck. No Weak source! Inferno hits hard. Need to kill fast.

TURN 1 PLAN: Free turn. Play Mental Fortress+ (1E), Like Water (1E), Enter Calm with Vigilance (2E) or Inner Peace. Total 4E. Setup complete. Sands of Time retains.

0 energy. Turn 1 complete. 16 damage dealt. Hexaghost at 234. Turn 2 is Divider. Need to block 30 damage.
Through Violence 0E for 20 dmg on Hexaghost before using Gambler Brew to redraw hand for block cards. Cannot waste TV by discarding it to brew.
Gambler Brew: discard hand (3 Strikes + Inner Peace), draw 4 new cards from draw pile. Draw pile has Defends, Vigilance, Mental Fortress+, Like Water. Need block for 30 incoming Divider.
